{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315133696180E0DEF9EE69F089D"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561586819119285017","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"已经打了一场把对方老大都打死了，竟然一直脱着不敢抢底盘，很赞的设定"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760574582,"group_id":"7540541521376840729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6I9w/08YJv40viJfuXnGqv9mlDys8xPXyUzDjZjRCNW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3192589878308160","user_name":"爱吃炎亭鱼饼的陈默可"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3192589878308160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540541521376840729","book_info":{"abstract":"父母惨死，家国蒙难，背负血海深仇，拜入青帮大佬门下，恩师却是投敌汉奸！
陆子峥，表面是青帮新贵，76号特务，实则军统王牌特工，在孤岛上海的万丈迷津中潜行。 一边是恩重如山的师父，一边是刻骨铭心的家仇国恨；一边是76号的残酷倾轧，一边是军统内部的猜忌与指令。
他戴着层层面具，在多方势力间巧妙周旋，步步为营，只为撕开黑暗，寻觅光明。
与虎谋皮，智斗76号魔头李克刑；化解危机，周旋于各路敌人之间，执行九死一生的任务。
从街头混混到王牌特工，每一次成长都伴随着鲜血与牺牲。
当信仰与情感激烈碰撞，当重重杀机接踵而至，他能否在恩师的“庇护”与“算计”下完成使命？
这场交织着背叛、牺牲、情义与智谋的生死对决，谁能笑到最后？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/be37eac4c501b73b409d7f3ebf207fb4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"如鱼得水","author_id":"","book_id":"7540541521376840729","book_name":"谍战76号：汉奸师傅生死局","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"13.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":973,"name":"战争军旅","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=973&name=战争军旅&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7540573951911545881","read_count":"5556","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2178054"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"394","tags":"精品小说,战争军旅","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/be37eac4c501b73b409d7f3ebf207fb4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434017&x-signature=%2FPC36OmeOYcoA7KLqai9p05Ew0U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315133696180E0DEF9EE69F089D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读32分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1911,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1939,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":11102},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561052536982242072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"跌宕起伏，悬念陡生。不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760447769,"group_id":"7540541521376840729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"descr
